evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long has only 5 VALID_0DTE trades but contributes $985.6, 234.36 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 146.2, and no slow trades. Its average hold is 50.5 minutes and worst MAE is -346.8, so exit distance rather than entry structure is the cleaner risk lever.
name: Charm Wall Breakaway Exit Compression
risk: Small sample; reducing target distance or multiplier can cut the profile's convex payoff and lower total net profit even if exposure improves.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway entries above the charm wall with confirmed breakout context but extended target distances.
validation_metric: Profile PnL/exposure stays above 200, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, completed trades decline by no more than 3, and average hold or average MAE improves without worsening worst MAE.
